## Checklist

- [ ] File is in the right place: `notes/{author-slug}/YYYY-MM-DD.md`
- [ ] Frontmatter includes `tags`, `author`, and `date`
- [ ] Tags are from the [approved list](../README.md#tags) (or I'm proposing a new one below)
- [ ] The note has actual content (not a placeholder or empty file)
- [ ] The date in the filename matches the `date` field in frontmatter
